archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Deep Tech
design_philosophy: Classy, Industrial, and Imposing. Harver Technologies is a $2.8B deep-tech powerhouse. We discard lightweight, bubbly 'tech' aesthetics in favor of a brutalist, industrial edge. We use 'Grid Borders' to expose the skeletal framework of the company's capabilities, using Jet Black backgrounds paired with stark Gunmetal and striking Signal Orange accents. Space is massive; typography is heavy and unrelenting.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8, p-12, p-16, and up to py-32 for sections. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (e.g., p-8) to avoid content collision.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID for Technologies and Stats. Dense, strict hierarchy. Use border-collapse logic. Apply 1px solid borders (border-[#222225]) with no radius.
spacing_and_layout.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay from-black/90 via-black/60 to-transparent to ensure text contrast while retaining the industrial image context.

components.button: Flat, sharp edges. bg-[#FF3B00] text-white. No radius (rounded-none). hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(255,59,0,0.3)] transition-transform px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide
components.card: Flat background (bg-surface), 1px subtle border (border-border), no radius. hover:bg-surface_hover transition-colors.
components.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/60 border-b border-[#222225]. Navigation links must be bold and geometric.
components.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Kinetic Texture: text-7xl font-black outline text (text-transparent), stroke-width-1, stroke-[#222225].
components.stats: Large monospace numbers (JetBrains Mono). Tracking-tighter. Use text-white or text-primary.
components.timeline: Vertical strict grid line (border-l border-[#222225]). Items branching off with mono dates and sharp rectangular connector nodes.
components.form: Input fields must be flat, bg-[#0C0C0E], border border-[#222225], text-white, rounded-none. focus:border-[#FF3B00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B00].

motion.hover: Explicitly set text color. Transitions on transform and opacity.
motion.scroll: MANDATORY: Use lenis for smooth scrolling to give the site a heavy, premium momentum.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items and timeline elements (Framer Motion).

hero_background.description: Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape - Use as dark atmospheric background for the hero section with a heavy black overlay.

core_expertise_machine.description: Massive gray engine/machine. Use for the Wireless Energy Harvesting core expertise section.

technologies_grid_bg.description: Green/Amber server light closeup. Use as an accent image within the 30 Technologies bento grid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add lenis framer-motion lucide-react @radix-ui/react-slot clsx tailwind-merge react-fast-marquee @fontsource/cabinet-grotesk @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans @fontsource/jetbrains-mono
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts to enforce the anti-default, industrial feel. Only use Shadcn components for complex interactive logic like the Contact Form.

Hero Section: Must use 'media.image_urls.hero_background' with a dark heavy gradient overlay. Implement a massive kinetic marquee (react-fast-marquee) spanning the background with outline text listing key verticals.
Stats Display ($2.8B, 214 Patents, etc.): Use a strict border-collapse grid layout. High contrast borders (border-[#222225]). Typography should be JetBrains Mono for the numbers.
30 Technologies Showcase: Use the 'Control Room Grid' approach. Do not list 30 randomly. Group them into distinct bento-box panels with sharp corners and grid lines.
Timeline (2012-2026): Minimalist, vertical layout. A single strict border-l line, with mono-font dates attached to horizontal 1px strokes.
Contact/Inquiry Form: Brutalist style. Flat dark inputs, square corners, signal orange focus rings. Include 'data-testid' on all inputs and the submit button.
Apply 'data-testid' to all key interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
